Continuous Internal Evaluation: Assessment of pre-lab assignments or quizzes testing understanding of the upcoming experiment
Continuous Internal Evaluation: Understanding of Theory based on preparation and theoretical background of experiments
Continuous Internal Evaluation: Conduct of Experiments including procedure adherence, execution, safety protocols, skill proficiency, accuracy, troubleshooting, and teamwork
Continuous Internal Evaluation: Lab Reports and Record Keeping including quality, clarity, completeness, accuracy, documentation, data analysis, conclusions, and timely submission
Continuous Internal Evaluation: Viva Voce including ability to explain the experiment, results, and underlying principles
End Semester Examination: Procedure/Preliminary Work/Design/Algorithm including procedure understanding, planning, organization, and algorithm development
End Semester Examination: Conduct of Experiment/Execution of Work/Programming including proper setup and accurate execution
End Semester Examination: Result with Valid Inference/Quality of Output including accuracy, precision, analysis, interpretation, and validity of inferences
End Semester Examination: Viva Voce including ability to explain experiment, procedure, results, and proficiency in theoretical and practical aspects
End Semester Examination: Record evaluation including completeness, clarity, and accuracy of submitted lab record
